title: Artificial Intelligence with Python
author: Alberto Artasanchez, Prateek Joshi
description: New edition of the bestselling guide to artificial intelligence with Python, updated to Python 3.x, with seven new chapters that cover RNNs, AI and Big Data, fundamental use cases, chatbots, and more.
